Korea.SourceText: Hover on a date point to view employee details.
Korea.TranslatedText: 직원 세부 정보를 볼 수있는 날짜 지점에서 호버.

Korea.SourceText: Hover over a week point to see overtime details.
Korea.TranslatedText: 일주일 이상 호버하면 초과 근무 세부 정보를 볼 수 있습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Hover on a week point to view overtime details.
Korea.TranslatedText: 일주일에 호버는 초과 근무 세부 사항을 볼 수 있습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Hover on the moon point to see Present or Absent details.
Korea.TranslatedText: 달의 호버는 현재 또는 부재한 세부 사항을 볼 수 있습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Hover on the month point to see Present or Absent details.
Korea.TranslatedText: 한 달에 호버는 현재 또는 부재한 세부 사항을 볼 수 있습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Hover on the moon point to see the working hours details.
Korea.TranslatedText: 달 위의 호버는 근무 시간 세부 사항을 볼 수 있습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Hover pada titik bulan untuk melihat detail jam kerja.
Korea.TranslatedText: 호버 pada titik bulan unTumelihat 세부 사항 잼 kerja.

Korea.SourceText: Are you sure you want to delete this?

Korea.TranslatedText: 이 작업은 실행 취소할 수 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while checking FingerPrint status.
Korea.TranslatedText: 지문 인쇄 상태를 확인하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while retrieving Attendance Log.
Korea.TranslatedText: 출석 로그를 가져오는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Drag and drop a file here or click to upload
Korea.TranslatedText: 여기에 파일을 끌어 놓거나 클릭하여 업로드하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Invalid file format. Please upload a .DAT file.
Korea.TranslatedText: 잘못된 파일 형식입니다..DAT 파일을 업로드해 주세요.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Holiday. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 홀리데이를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Holiday. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 홀리데이를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Duration cannot be greater than available credit.
Korea.TranslatedText: 기간은 사용 가능한 신용보다 클 수 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Please specify a valid leave duration.
The leave duration ({0} days) exceeds the available credit ({1} days) in the selected leave quota.
Korea.TranslatedText: 휴가 기간 (일) 은 선택한 휴가 할당량에서 사용 가능한 크레딧 (일) 을 초과합니다.

Korea.SourceText: The Next Shift Will Be Read From This Setting (Roaster)
Korea.TranslatedText: 다음 시프트는 이 설정에서 읽을 것입니다 (로스터).

Korea.SourceText: Failed to load the report. Please try generating it again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 보고서를 불러올 수 없습니다.다시 생성해 보시기 바랍니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Education. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 교육을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Education. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 교육을 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Please enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Name must be at least 2 characters
Phone number must be at least 10 digits
Phone number must not exceed 15 digits
Phone number must contain only digits
Score must be a valid number
Company Name must not exceed 100 characters
Company Name must be at least 2 characters
Korea.TranslatedText: 회사 이름은 최소 2 자 이상이어야 합니다.

Korea.SourceText: Year Start must be a number
Year End must be a number
Tax Number cannot be null or empty.
Korea.TranslatedText: 세금 번호는 null 또는 비어있을 수 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: Tax Number must contain exactly 15 digits.
Please correct the validation errors before saving.
Korea.TranslatedText: 저장하기 전에 유효성 검사 오류를 수정하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Are you sure you want to deactivate Employee Self-Service?
This action cannot be undone. You need to contact administrator to reactivate this account.
Korea.TranslatedText: 이 동작은 취소할 수 없습니다.이 계정을 다시 활성화하려면 관리자에게 문의해야 합니다.

Korea.SourceText: Are you sure you want to enable Employee Self-Service?
This action will enable Employee Self-Service and grant you access to the system. Once activated, you will receive a confirmation email to reset your password.
Korea.TranslatedText: 이 작업은 직원 셀프 서비스를 활성화하고 시스템에 대한 액세스를 부여합니다.활성화되면 비밀번호를 재설정할 수 있는 확인 이메일을 받게 됩니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Ethnic. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 민족성을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Server error occurred. Please try again.
An error occurred while updating the Ethnic. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 민족성을 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Hobby. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 취미를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Hobby. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 취미를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Language. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 언어를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Language. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 언어를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Nationality. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 국적을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Nationality. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 국적을 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Religion. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 종교를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Religion. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 종교를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Skill. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 스킬 생성 중 에러가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Skill. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 스킬 업데이트 중 에러가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Bank. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 은행을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Bank. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 은행을 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the City. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 시티를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the City. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 시티를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.
도시 데이터를 불러오는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Country. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 국가를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Country. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 국가를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Curenncy. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 큐렌시를 만드는 중 오류가 발생하였습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Grade. Please try again
Korea.TranslatedText: 그레이드를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Grade. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 그레이드를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Organization. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 조직을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.
조직 데이터를 불러오는 중 오류 발생

Korea.SourceText: Please view the organization structure first before exporting.
Korea.TranslatedText: 수출하기 전에 조직 구조를 먼저 보시기 바랍니다.

Korea.SourceText: Error exporting organization structure. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 조직 구조를 내보내는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Position. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 위치를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Province. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 도를 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Province. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 도를 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Title. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 제목을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Title. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 제목을 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Min Experience cannot be zero or empty
Korea.TranslatedText: 최소 경험은 0 또는 비어 있을 수 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Title Qualification. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 제목 자격을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: Failed to fetch calendar event data
You are not authorized to save calendar event data.
Korea.TranslatedText: 일정 이벤트 데이터를 저장할 권한이 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: You are not authorized to create email config data.
Korea.TranslatedText: 이메일 설정 데이터를 만들 권한이 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Email Config. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 이메일 설정을 만드는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: You are not authorized to update email config data.
Korea.TranslatedText: 이메일 설정 데이터를 업데이트 할 권한이 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Email Config. Please try again.
Korea.TranslatedText: 이메일 설정을 업데이트하는 중 오류가 발생했습니다.다시 시도하십시오.

Korea.SourceText: You are not authorized to save navigation access data.
Korea.TranslatedText: 탐색 액세스 데이터를 저장할 권한이 없습니다.

Korea.SourceText: You are not authorized to save organization access data.
Korea.TranslatedText: 조직 액세스 데이터를 저장할 권한이 없습니다.

Arabic.TranslatedText: لا توجد بيانات متاحة في الجدول
لم يتم العثور على طلبات الموافقة.

Arabic.SourceText: Hover on a date point to view employee details.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ( هوفر ) في موعد يشير إلى رؤية تفاصيل الموظفين

Arabic.SourceText: Hover over a week point to see overtime details.
Arabic.TranslatedText: أكثر من أسبوع نقطة لرؤية تفاصيل العمل الإضافي.

Arabic.SourceText: Hover on a week point to view overtime details.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ( هوفر ) في نقطة أسبوع لرؤية تفاصيل العمل الإضافي

Arabic.SourceText: Hover on the moon point to see Present or Absent details.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ( هوفر ) على القمر يشير إلى رؤية التفاصيل الحالية أو الغائبة

Arabic.SourceText: Hover on the month point to see Present or Absent details.
Arabic.TranslatedText: هوفر في نقطة الشهر لرؤية التفاصيل الحالية أو الغائبة.

Arabic.SourceText: Hover on the moon point to see the working hours details.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ( هوفر ) على القمر يشير لرؤية تفاصيل ساعات العمل

Arabic.SourceText: Hover pada titik bulan untuk melihat detail jam kerja.
Arabic.TranslatedText: هوفر بادا تيتيك بولان أونتوك مليات تفاصيل المربى كيرجا

Arabic.SourceText: Are you sure you want to delete this?
Arabic.TranslatedText: هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد حذف هذا؟
لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.
لم يتم العثور على سجلات مطابقة

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while checking FingerPrint status.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء التحقق من حالة بصمات الأصابع.

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while retrieving Attendance Log.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء استرجاع سجل الحضور.

Arabic.SourceText: Drag and drop a file here or click to upload
Arabic.TranslatedText: اسحب وأسقط ملفاً هنا أو انقر لتحميله

Arabic.SourceText: Invalid file format. Please upload a .DAT file.
Arabic.TranslatedText: شكل ملف غير صالح. يرجى تحميل ملف.
آسف ، الحد الأقصى لحجم الملف هو 1MB.

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Holiday. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء إنشاء العطلة. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Holiday. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء تحديث العطلة. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: Duration cannot be greater than available credit.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ولا يمكن أن تكون المدة أكبر من الائتمان المتاح.

Arabic.SourceText: Please specify a valid leave duration.
The leave duration ({0} days) exceeds the available credit ({1} days) in the selected leave quota.
Arabic.TranslatedText: وتتجاوز مدة الإجازة ( { 0 } أيام ) الائتمان المتاح ( { 1 } أيام ) في حصة الإجازة المختارة.

Arabic.SourceText: The Next Shift Will Be Read From This Setting (Roaster)
Arabic.TranslatedText: التحول التالي سيقرأ من هذا الإطار ( روستر )
تم تحميل قوات الدفاع الشعبي بنجاح
فشل في تحميل قوات الدفاع الشعبي

Arabic.SourceText: Failed to load the report. Please try generating it again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: فشل في تحميل التقرير. يرجى محاولة توليد مرة أخرى.

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Education. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء إنشاء التعليم. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Education. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء تحديث التعليم. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى
رقم المعاش التقاعدي لمكتب المدعي العام
المعاشات التقاعدية المسجلة لدى مكتب المدعي العام

Arabic.SourceText: Please enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Arabic.TranslatedText: يرجى إدخال تاريخ صالح في نموذج YYYMM-DD

Arabic.SourceText: Name must be at least 2 characters
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب أن يكون الاسم على الأقل شخصيتين

Arabic.SourceText: Phone number must be at least 10 digits
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب أن يكون رقم الهاتف 10 أرقام على الأقل

Arabic.SourceText: Phone number must not exceed 15 digits
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب ألا يتجاوز رقم الهاتف 15 رقماً

Arabic.SourceText: Phone number must contain only digits
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب أن يحتوي رقم الهاتف على أرقام فقط

Arabic.SourceText: Score must be a valid number
Company Name must not exceed 100 characters
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب ألا يتجاوز اسم الشركة 100 حرف

Arabic.SourceText: Company Name must be at least 2 characters
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب أن يكون اسم الشركة على الأقل حرفين

Arabic.SourceText: Year Start must be a number
Arabic.TranslatedText: بداية السنة يجب أن تكون رقماً
بداية السنة يجب أن تكون 4 أرقام

Arabic.SourceText: Year End must be a number
Arabic.TranslatedText: نهاية السنة يجب أن تكون رقماً
نهاية السنة يجب أن تكون 4 أرقام

Arabic.SourceText: Tax Number cannot be null or empty.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ولا يمكن أن يكون رقم الضريبة لاغيا أو فارغا.

Arabic.SourceText: Tax Number must contain exactly 15 digits.
Arabic.TranslatedText: يجب أن يحتوي رقم الضريبة على 15 رقمًا بالضبط.

Arabic.SourceText: Please correct the validation errors before saving.
Arabic.TranslatedText: يرجى تصحيح أخطاء التحقق قبل الادخار.

Arabic.SourceText: Are you sure you want to deactivate Employee Self-Service?
Arabic.TranslatedText: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد تعطيل الخدمة الذاتية للموظفين؟

Arabic.SourceText: This action cannot be undone. You need to contact administrator to reactivate this account.
Arabic.TranslatedText: ولا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء. يجب أن تتصل بالمدير لإعادة تنشيط هذا الحساب

Arabic.SourceText: Are you sure you want to enable Employee Self-Service?
Arabic.TranslatedText: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد تمكين الخدمة الذاتية للموظفين؟

Arabic.SourceText: This action will enable Employee Self-Service and grant you access to the system. Once activated, you will receive a confirmation email to reset your password.
Arabic.TranslatedText: هذا الإجراء سيمكن الموظفين من الخدمة الذاتية ويمنحك الوصول إلى النظام. بمجرد تفعيلها ، ستتلقى رسالة تأكيد لإعادة تعيين كلمة المرور الخاصة بك.

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Ethnic. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء خلق العرق. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: Server error occurred. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ في الخادم. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Ethnic. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء تحديث الإثنية. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Hobby. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء إنشاء الهوبي. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Hobby. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء تحديث الهوبي. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Language. Please try again.
Arabic.TranslatedText: حدث خطأ أثناء إنشاء اللغة. أرجوك حاول مرة أخرى

Arabic.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Language. Please try again.

China.SourceText: Hover on a date point to view employee details.
China.TranslatedText: 将鼠标悬停在日期点上可查看员工详细信息。

China.SourceText: Hover over a week point to see overtime details.
China.TranslatedText: 将鼠标悬停在周点上可查看加班详细信息。

China.SourceText: Hover on a week point to view overtime details.
China.TranslatedText: 将鼠标悬停在周点上可查看加班详细信息。

China.SourceText: Hover on the moon point to see Present or Absent details.
China.TranslatedText: 在月亮点上悬停以查看存在或不存在的细节。

China.SourceText: Hover on the month point to see Present or Absent details.
China.TranslatedText: 将鼠标悬停在月点上以查看存在或不存在的详细信息。

China.SourceText: Hover on the moon point to see the working hours details.
China.TranslatedText: 将鼠标悬停在月球点上以查看工作时间详情。

China.SourceText: Hover pada titik bulan untuk melihat detail jam kerja.
China.TranslatedText: Hover Pada Titik Bulan Untuk Melihat细节Jam Kerja。

China.SourceText: Are you sure you want to delete this?
An error occurred while checking FingerPrint status.
An error occurred while retrieving Attendance Log.
Drag and drop a file here or click to upload
China.TranslatedText: 将文件拖放到此处或单击以上载

China.SourceText: Invalid file format. Please upload a .DAT file.
China.TranslatedText: 文件格式无效。请上传.dat文件。

China.SourceText: An error occurred while creating the Holiday. Please try again.
China.TranslatedText: 创建假日时出错。请重试。

China.SourceText: An error occurred while updating the Holiday. Please try again.
China.TranslatedText: 更新假日时出错。请重试。

China.SourceText: Duration cannot be greater than available credit.
China.TranslatedText: 持续时间不能大于可用额度。

China.SourceText: Please specify a valid leave duration.
China.TranslatedText: 请指定有效的休假期限。

China.SourceText: The leave duration ({0} days) exceeds the available credit ({1} days) in the selected leave quota.
China.TranslatedText: 假期时长（{0}天）超过所选假期额度中的可用天数（{1}天）。

China.SourceText: The Next Shift Will Be Read From This Setting (Roaster)
China.TranslatedText: 将从此设置（烘烤器）读取下一个班次

China.TranslatedText: 无法加载报告。请尝试重新生成。

China.TranslatedText: 创建教育时出错。请重试。

China.TranslatedText: 更新教育程度时出错。请重试。

China.SourceText: Please enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format
China.TranslatedText: 请以YYYY-MM-DD格式输入有效日期
家庭成员姓名为必填项

China.SourceText: Name must be at least 2 characters
China.TranslatedText: 名称必须至少为2个字符

China.SourceText: Phone number must be at least 10 digits
China.TranslatedText: 电话号码必须至少为10位数

China.SourceText: Phone number must not exceed 15 digits
Phone number must contain only digits
China.TranslatedText: 电话号码只能包含数字

China.SourceText: Score must be a valid number
Company Name must not exceed 100 characters
China.TranslatedText: 公司名称不得超过100个字符

China.SourceText: Company Name must be at least 2 characters
China.TranslatedText: 公司名称必须至少包含2个字符

China.SourceText: Year Start must be a number

China.TranslatedText: 年份开始必须为4位数字

China.SourceText: Year End must be a number
Tax Number cannot be null or empty.
Tax Number must contain exactly 15 digits.
China.TranslatedText: 税号必须正好包含15位数字。

China.SourceText: Please correct the validation errors before saving.
China.TranslatedText: 请在保存之前更正验证错误。

China.SourceText: Are you sure you want to deactivate Employee Self-Service?
China.TranslatedText: 是否确定要停用员工自助服务？

China.SourceText: This action cannot be undone. You need to contact administrator to reactivate this account.
China.TranslatedText: 此操作无法撤消。您需要联系管理员以重新激活此帐户。

China.SourceText: Are you sure you want to enable Employee Self-Service?
China.TranslatedText: 是否确定要启用员工自助服务？

China.SourceText: This action will enable Employee Self-Service and grant you access to the system. Once activated, you will receive a confirmation email to reset your password.
China.TranslatedText: 此操作将启用员工自助服务并授予您访问系统的权限。激活后，您将收到一封重置密码的确认电子邮件。
